2121170.name: Hero Fodder
2121170.description:
ABOUT THIS GAME



Hero Fodder pulls the player into the lives of the lower-level monsters; your Slimes, Goblins, Skeletons, and Giant Rats. In a world where the heroes invade the monster’s castle and come out overbearingly victorious, it’s now up to the generally weak monsters to fight back against the heroes and reclaim what was once theirs.

This game was created as a student project, and is still in a beta state.

LEAD YOUR TEAM



Command your band of undesirables as they crawl their way through randomly generated battles, enchanting potion shops, and haunting sacrificial altar rooms, all in the hopes of reclaiming their home.

REDEFINE DEATH




Dying is not so much a setback as it is a boon. To die is not to lose, but to allow for your brethren to learn from your experiences, and shape your team into something even stronger.

DEFEAT TERRIFYING FOES



Take on enemies much greater than yourself, and conquer the heroes' most powerful forces, drawing out the best in your team at those crucial moments in heated combat.
